The Chosen Ones · Book 1

Ordinary Gods

by Nerdy Fiction

“The universe does not announce itself.”

On the last night of 2026, at exactly 10:00 PM Eastern, something changed at the level where reality itself is written. Eight billion people felt nothing. Twelve hesitated. This is the story of four of them.

Start Chapter 1 → Follow via RSS

Cast

The Chosen Ones

  • Robert Calloway

    An actor who keeps showing up fifteen minutes early.

  • Alex Whitfield

    A mechanic who watches the game with surgical focus.

  • —

Chapters

1 of 1 published

  1. Chapter 1 · 14 min read

    Ordinary Gods

    The universe does not announce itself. On the last night of 2026, at exactly 10:00 PM Eastern, something changes. Twelve people hesitate. Robert Calloway is one of them — and an oversized art book in a Studio City waiting room is about to refuse to fall.

    Published June 13, 2026
